vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (sự thay đổi thú vị)
vocab.example: Visiting a contemporary gallery after a long week of office work is a real breath of fresh air for my mental state.

vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ nghệ thuật tiên phong
vocab.example: I tend to frequent independent exhibitions that cater to more avant-garde sensibilities rather than mainstream tastes.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn để suy ngẫm
vocab.example: The quiet halls of a national gallery serve as a perfect sanctuary for reflection amidst the chaos of urban life.

vocab.meaning: đồng điệu với/tạo được tiếng vang với
vocab.example: Abstract expressionism doesn't always resonate with me, but I find the boldness of the colors quite captivating.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua giới hạn thời gian
vocab.example: I love how classical portraits seem to transcend time, capturing human emotions that are still relevant today.

vocab.meaning: thu hút thị giác một cách mãnh liệt
vocab.example: The centerpiece of the exhibit was a visually arresting sculpture made entirely of recycled industrial materials.
Exploring various artistic mediums, from oil on canvas to digital installations, is what makes gallery visits so intriguing.

vocab.meaning: di tích/địa điểm di sản văn hóa
vocab.example: Many galleries are housed in historic buildings that are cultural heritage sites in their own right.

vocab.meaning: sức mạnh khơi gợi (cảm xúc/ký ức)
vocab.example: I was struck by the evocative power of the landscape paintings, which vividly depicted the harshness of winter.
There is nothing quite like standing in a silent hall to behold the beauty of a Renaissance masterpiece in person.
